summary: Replaced sed patterns with awk single-pass in PHASE 2 (update_todo_task_entry) and PHASE 3 Mode A (update_todo_task_order). Both functions now use sub(/\[[A-Z ]+\]/, "[NEW_STATUS]") for direct replacement with proper failure detection.

artifacts.summary: Describes awk single-pass replacement for sed extraction+replacement patterns in update-task-status.sh, with verification test output
